data.speaker: polly
data.text: Look at the bus! I am thinking of traveling, but Manya is planning. He is using the GOING TO structure! Let's build some sentences.

questions.sentence: I am going to cook rice.
Polly is going to fly up-country.
We are going to revise books.
They are going to board the bus.
Manya is going to visit relatives.

data.speaker: kiki
data.text: Meow! Now let's BUILD our own Going To sentence. Drag the blocks into the right spots!
